faq.q1: How can I find freelance work opportunities in Guinea?
faq.a1: Create a profile on our platform and browse available projects in your prefecture. We connect local freelancers with companies, NGOs, and expats across Guinea.
faq.q2: Can I get training to improve my skills?
faq.a2: Yes! We offer training modules for IT skills, SAP, software development, and more. Perfect for upskilling local talent.
faq.q3: How do I update my freelancer profile?
faq.a3: Navigate to your Freelancer Dashboard → Profile section to update your skills, location, and portfolio.
faq.q4: Do you provide services for NGOs operating in Guinea?
faq.a4: Absolutely! We specialize in NGO tech support, device rentals, training programs, and IT solutions tailored for development organizations across all prefectures.
faq.q5: Can expats and foreign companies access your services?
faq.a5: Yes! We provide tech solutions, device rentals, and freelancer connections for expatriates and international companies operating in Guinea.
faq.q6: Do you offer bulk device rentals for organizations?
faq.a6: Yes, we provide corporate device rental packages perfect for companies, NGOs, and organizations needing multiple smartphones or laptops.
faq.still_questions: Still have questions? Contact our team.

post.title: How NGOs Can Use IT Solutions to Empower Rural Communities in Guinea
post.author: Admin User
post.content_p1: Rural communities in Guinea face numerous challenges, but IT solutions are beginning to bridge the gap. NGOs are increasingly turning to technology to empower these regions, improve access to education, and streamline healthcare delivery.
post.content_p2: One of the primary obstacles is consistent internet connectivity. However, recent initiatives to deploy satellite internet and mesh networks are showing immense promise. By establishing reliable communication channels, local leaders can coordinate more effectively with international support networks.
post.content_p3: E-learning platforms tailored for low-bandwidth environments are revolutionizing how information is shared. Interactive modules on agricultural best practices and public health can now be accessed via basic smartphones, which have a surprisingly high penetration rate even in remote areas.
post.quote: Technology is not just a tool; it's a bridge to opportunity for communities that have historically been left behind.
post.content_p4: The path forward requires continued investment and collaboration between NGOs, private tech companies, and local governments. As these IT solutions scale, we can expect to see a profound, sustainable impact on the quality of life in Guinea's rural sectors.

company_history.headline: Our Journey: Youth, Innovation, Security
company_history.subheadline: Freelance-224, founded by Guinean IT experts with global experience, empowers local talent through secure solutions, connecting SMEs, NGOs, institutions, and global users.
company_history.founding: In 2024, Guinean youth and diaspora, with decades of IT expertise from freelancing for global firms, founded Freelance-224 to address unemployment in Conakry. Our secure, mobile-first platform delivers Cybersecurity, AI, Data Science, and IT services, alongside device purchases and rentals, prioritizing encrypted transactions for local SMEs, NGOs, and global clients. Example: “Launched with 18 secure alpha users in Conakry.”
company_history.milestone_1: 2024: Launched platform with secure alpha testing (18 users, encrypted data).
company_history.milestone_2: 2025: Secured partnerships with Orange Guinea and CCC; showcased secure platform at GFW 2025 (August 2025).
company_history.milestone_3: 2026: Target 1,500 users, 150M GNF revenue, expanded Cybersecurity/AI services.
company_history.partnerships: Trusted by Orange Guinea and CCC, our platform, built by Guinean IT experts, delivers secure solutions for local SMEs, NGOs, institutions, and global users, fostering jobs and trust.
company_history.copyright: © 2025 Freelance-224. Securing Guinean Talent, Connecting the World.

solutions.main_heading: Comprehensive Tech Solutions for Guinean Businesses, NGOs, Companies & Organizations

erp.title: ERP/SAP Solutions
erp.description: Implement, optimize, and customize SAP/ERP systems for industries like mining, agriculture, and tech.

impl.title: SAP Implementation
impl.desc: Full setup and integration for your business processes.

flip.title: SAP Implementation – Full Setup and Integration for Your Business Processes in Guinea
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we provide end-to-end SAP implementation services tailored to businesses in Guinea. We help streamline operations, improve efficiency, and deliver real-time visibility through a single integrated system.

services.analysis_desc: Study finance, HR, sales, supply chain, logistics, and align with best practices.
services.setup_desc: Installation, configuration, and module selection (FI, MM, SD, HR, etc.) to match your size and sector.
services.migration_desc: Secure transfer of existing data and connection with CRM, e‑commerce, and cloud services.
services.customization_desc: Adapt SAP to the Guinean environment, including local tax and regulatory compliance.
services.training_desc: On‑site or remote training to empower staff to fully leverage SAP.

why_list: Centralizes all business operations into one platform.
Reduces manual processes and errors.
Provides clear reporting for better decisions.
Helps businesses compete regionally and internationally.
Adapts to SMEs and large corporations in Guinea.
flip.conclusion: With full SAP integration, your company can move from fragmented tools and manual processes to a modern digital ERP system that supports growth and competitiveness in the Guinean market.

flip.title: ERP Optimization – Full Setup and Integration for Your Business Processes
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we specialize in ERP optimization, helping businesses in Guinea move from manual processes and scattered tools to an integrated system that streamlines operations across departments.

services.process_desc: Map finance, HR, logistics, inventory, sales, and supply chain.
services.selection_desc: Choose and implement the right ERP for your size, industry, and budget.
services.migration_desc: Import history and connect ERP to e‑commerce, CRM, POS, cloud.
services.customization_desc: Configure for Guinean tax, accounting, and legal needs.
services.training_desc: Enable teams to use ERP effectively.
services.support_desc: Updates, troubleshooting, and scaling as you grow.

flip.platforms_title: We work with many ERP platforms:
platforms_list: Oracle NetSuite – Cloud ERP for finance and global ops.
Microsoft Dynamics 365 – Flexible, integrates with Microsoft tools.
Odoo – Open‑source, cost‑effective for SMEs in Guinea.
Zoho ERP / Zoho One – Affordable cloud ERP with CRM/HR/finance.
Tally ERP – Popular for accounting/finance management.
QuickBooks Enterprise – For SMEs focused on accounting.
Infor ERP – Strong in manufacturing and logistics.
Custom ERP Solutions – When off‑the‑shelf does not fit.
why_list: Automates financial, operational, and administrative processes.
Real‑time insights for better decisions.
Improves supply chain and logistics efficiency.
Reduces costs by minimizing errors and duplication.
Supports both SMEs and large corporations.
flip.conclusion: With the right ERP setup and optimization, companies in Guinea gain transparency, reduce inefficiencies, and compete effectively in local and international markets.

custom.title: Custom Solutions
custom.desc: Tailored ERP configurations for your industry.

flip.title: Custom Solutions – Tailored ERP Configurations for Your Industry
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we understand that every business is unique. That’s why we provide custom ERP configurations designed for the specific needs of your industry in Guinea. We help streamline operations, improve efficiency, and give you better control over critical processes.
flip.industries_title: Industries and businesses that benefit in Guinea:
industries_list: Retail & E-commerce – Inventory, POS, online store integration, CX optimization.
Logistics & Transportation – Fleet, parcel tracking, route optimization, supply chain.
Import & Export / Trade – Customs docs, warehouse management, financial reporting.
Banking & Microfinance – Finance, loan processing, customer data integration.
Healthcare & Pharmaceuticals – Patient records, admin, inventory, compliance.
Education & Training – E-learning, student management, HR, finance.
Construction & Real Estate – Project management, planning, accounting, assets.
Agriculture & Agribusiness – Farm planning, production tracking, distribution, sales.
Manufacturing & Industry – Scheduling, supply chain, quality control, maintenance.
Hospitality & Tourism – Hotel management, bookings, HR, customer service.
Public Sector & NGOs – Administration, project monitoring, budget control, reporting.
solutions_list: Customized Modules – Finance, HR, supply chain, CRM, and more.
Integration with Local Systems – Tax, payroll, and compliance for Guinea.
Scalable Architecture – From startups/SMEs to large enterprises.
Training & Support – Equip teams to manage and maximize ERP value.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224, your ERP becomes a strategic tool adapted to your industry and business reality in Guinea.

it_support.title: IT Support
it_support.description: Reliable IT support for hardware, software, and network issues, ensuring minimal downtime.

flip.title: 24/7 IT Support – On-Demand Assistance for All Your IT Issues
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we know how critical technology is for running a business in today’s digital world. That’s why we provide 24/7 IT support, ensuring that your systems remain secure, reliable, and efficient—anytime you need help.
services_list: Network Troubleshooting – Connectivity, routers, firewalls, and VPNs.
Server & Cloud Management – Setup, monitoring, and maintenance.
Hardware & Software Support – Diagnostics, repair, installation, configuration.
Cybersecurity Monitoring – Protection against malware, phishing, and intrusions.
Email & Collaboration Tools – Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, and business apps.
ERP & Business Applications – SAP, Odoo, Microsoft Dynamics, and more.
Backup & Data Recovery – Safeguard critical information in incidents.
User Training & Helpdesk – Help staff resolve everyday IT challenges.
why_list: Frequent disruptions from unstable networks, power outages, and system failures.
Round-the-clock support keeps operations running and avoids costly downtime.
Fast response helps startups, SMEs, and enterprises seize opportunities.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224’s 24/7 support, you focus on your business while we handle technical issues—quickly, efficiently, and professionally.

flip.title: Hardware Troubleshooting – Professional Repairs for Laptops, Smartphones, and Desktops
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we provide fast and reliable hardware troubleshooting services to keep your devices running smoothly. Whether you are an individual, a startup, or a large business in Guinea, our team ensures your IT equipment is always in top condition.
services_list: Laptop Repairs – Screen replacement, battery issues, keyboard faults, overheating, software reinstallation.
Smartphone Repairs – Screen and touch repairs, charging problems, battery replacement, system resets, and app issues.
Desktop & Workstation Support – Power supply issues, hardware upgrades, virus removal, and optimization.
Peripheral Devices – Printers, scanners, monitors, and external drives troubleshooting.
Preventive Maintenance – Regular check-ups to reduce breakdowns and extend lifespan.
Data Backup & Recovery – Protect and restore important files in case of hardware failure.
On-site & Remote Support – Assistance at your office, home, or via remote diagnostic tools.
flip.why_title: Why this service matters for Guinea:
why_list: Businesses rely heavily on laptops and smartphones for daily operations.
Fast, reliable troubleshooting reduces downtime and prevents productivity loss.
Affordable maintenance keeps devices functional without frequent replacements.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224, you get professional hardware troubleshooting and repair services that extend the life of your devices and keep your business running without interruptions.

flip.title: Network Management – Optimize Performance and Strengthen Security
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we help businesses and organizations in Guinea design, manage, and secure their IT networks to ensure smooth and reliable connectivity. A strong network is the backbone of every modern business, and we make sure yours is always performing at its best.
services_list: Network Setup & Configuration – Routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points.
Performance Optimization – Monitor bandwidth, reduce downtime, and improve speed.
Cybersecurity Protection – Firewalls, IDS/IPS, VPNs, and anti-malware solutions.
LAN & WAN Solutions – Networks tailored for offices, schools, and enterprises.
Wi‑Fi Deployment – Reliable and secure wireless for businesses, hotels, and institutions.
Cloud & Remote Access – Secure VPNs and cloud integration for remote work.
Troubleshooting & Maintenance – Rapid response to outages and connectivity issues.
Network Audits – Regular analysis to detect vulnerabilities and improve performance.
why_list: Unstable internet and security challenges are common across Conakry and beyond.
Poorly managed networks cause downtime, productivity loss, and security risks.
Optimized, secure networks improve efficiency, protect data, and customer service.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224’s network management expertise, you get a secure, stable, high‑performing network infrastructure that supports your growth.

integration.title: IT Solution Integration
integration.description: Seamlessly connect software and hardware for unified operations.

api.title: API & System Integration
api.desc: Connect different software for smooth data flow.

flip.title: API & System Integration – Connect Software for Smooth Data Flow
flip.intro: At Freelance-224, we specialize in connecting your disparate software systems into a unified, efficient workflow. Whether you need to link your CRM with your accounting software or connect your e-commerce site to your inventory management, we have the expertise to make it happen.
services_list: Custom API Development – Tailored interfaces to connect applications.
Third-Party Integration – Payment gateways, shipping providers, and marketing tools.
Legacy System Modernization – Connect older systems with modern cloud apps.
Data Synchronization – Ensure consistency across all your platforms in real-time.
Workflow Automation – Reduce manual entry by automating data transfer between apps.
flip.why_title: Why integration matters for your business:
why_list: Eliminates data silos and improves information accessibility.
Reduces manual errors and saves time on data entry.
Enhances decision-making with a unified view of business data.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224, your systems work together seamlessly, empowering your business to operate more efficiently and effectively.

cloud.title: Cloud Migration
cloud.desc: Move your business to the cloud securely.

flip.title: Cloud Migration – Move Your Business to the Cloud Securely
flip.intro: Transitioning to the cloud is essential for modern businesses. Freelance-224 helps you migrate your data, applications, and infrastructure to the cloud securely and efficiently, minimizing disruption to your operations.
services_list: Cloud Strategy & Consulting – Choose the right provider (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).
Data Migration – Secure transfer of databases and files with minimal downtime.
Application Re-hosting (Lift & Shift) – Move existing apps to the cloud.
Hybrid Cloud Solutions – Combine on-premise infrastructure with cloud scalability.
Security & Compliance – Ensure your cloud environment meets industry standards.
why_list: Scalability to grow your resources as your business expands.
Cost savings by reducing the need for on-site hardware maintenance.
Enhanced accessibility allowing remote work from anywhere.
flip.conclusion: Trust Freelance-224 to guide your cloud journey, ensuring a smooth transition that unlocks new opportunities for growth and innovation.

iot.title: IoT Solutions
iot.desc: Smart devices for tracking and monitoring.

flip.title: IoT Solutions – Smart Devices for Tracking and Monitoring
flip.intro: Leverage the power of the Internet of Things (IoT) to gain real-time insights into your operations. Freelance-224 provides end-to-end IoT solutions tailored for industries in Guinea, from agriculture to logistics.
services_list: Asset Tracking – Real-time monitoring of vehicles, equipment, and cargo.
Smart Agriculture – Sensors for soil moisture, temperature, and automated irrigation.
Industrial IoT – Monitor machinery health and predict maintenance needs.
Smart Building Solutions – Energy management, security access, and occupancy monitoring.
Data Analytics – Turn IoT data into actionable business intelligence.
why_list: Improves operational efficiency and reduces waste.
Enhances visibility and control over remote assets.
Enables data-driven decisions for better resource management.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224’s IoT solutions, you can connect your physical assets to the digital world, driving efficiency and innovation in your business.

outsourcing.title: IT Outsourcing
outsourcing.description: Hire skilled developers, designers, and IT staff on demand.

staffing.title: Staff Augmentation
staffing.desc: Scale your team with temporary or permanent IT staff.

flip.title: Staff Augmentation – Scale Your Team with Skilled IT Professionals
flip.intro: Need extra hands for a project or long-term support? Freelance-224 provides skilled IT professionals to augment your existing team, allowing you to scale up or down as needed without the overhead of hiring full-time employees.
services_list: Software Development – Frontend, Backend, Full Stack, Mobile variants.
IT Support & Helpdesk – Level 1, 2, and 3 support engineers.
Project Management – Experienced PMs to lead your initiatives.
QA & Testing – Testers to ensure your software is bug-free.
UI/UX Design – Creative designers to improve user experience.
why_list: Access to a vast pool of pre-vetted, qualified professionals.
Flexibility to adjust team size based on project demands.
Reduced recruitment costs and administrative burden.
flip.conclusion: Freelance-224 connects you with the right talent to meet your business goals efficiently and cost-effectively.

project.title: Project Outsourcing
project.desc: Outsource entire IT projects to our expert team.

flip.title: Project Outsourcing – Delegate Your IT Projects to Experts
flip.intro: Focus on your core business while we handle your IT projects from start to finish. Freelance-224 offers comprehensive project outsourcing services, delivering high-quality results on time and within budget.
services_list: Web & Mobile App Development – Custom solutions tailored to your needs.
Enterprise Software Implementation – CRM, ERP, and bespoke business apps.
IT Infrastructure Setup – Network design, server deployment, and security.
Digital Transformation – Modernizing your business processes with technology.
Consulting & Strategy – Expert advice to align IT with your business objectives.
why_list: Access to a dedicated team of experts across various domains.
Proven methodologies ensuring quality and timely delivery.
Cost-effective solutions compared to in-house development.
flip.conclusion: Partner with Freelance-224 to turn your ideas into reality. We handle the technical complexities so you can focus on growing your business.

managed.title: Managed Services
managed.desc: Comprehensive management of your IT infrastructure.

flip.title: Managed Services – Comprehensive Management of Your IT Infrastructure
flip.intro: Let Freelance-224 take full responsibility for your IT operations. Our managed services provide proactive monitoring, maintenance, and support, ensuring your technology drives your business forward consistently.
services_list: Proactive Monitoring – 24/7 oversight to detect and resolve issues before impact.
System Maintenance – Regular updates, patching, and optimization.
Security Management – Continuous threat detection and response.
Vendor Management – We handle specific technology vendors for you.
Strategic Planning – Regular reviews to align IT roadmap with business goals.
why_list: Predictable IT costs with flat-rate pricing models.
Improved system reliability and reduced downtime.
Access to enterprise-level operational maturity for SMEs.
flip.conclusion: With Freelance-224 as your managed services partner, you gain peace of mind knowing your IT infrastructure is in expert hands.
